projects.name: Ozone Urbana
projects.address: Survey No. 118/2, Devanahalli, Bengaluru 562110
projects.verdict: Be careful — we found serious issues
projects.verdict_detail: Multiple critical problems: active litigation, undisclosed mortgage, and a government investigation. Get legal advice before proceeding.
projects.flag_reason: CRITICAL: Active High Court litigation on Sy. No. 118/2 · Undisclosed ₹47 Cr bank mortgage · Enforcement Directorate investigation · RERA registration lapsed

rera.label: RERA Lapsed — Not Renewed
rera.detail: RERA registration expired in 2022 and has not been renewed. Selling without valid RERA is a criminal offence under RERA Act, 2016.

title.label: Undisclosed ₹47 Cr Bank Mortgage
title.detail: Kaveri 2.0 shows an active mortgage of ₹47.2 Cr to Axis Bank on Survey No. 118/2. This was never disclosed to homebuyers. If the developer defaults, the bank has first claim on the land.

court.label: Active High Court Litigation
court.detail: Karnataka HC Case HC/BLR/2024/0392 — disputed ownership on Sy. No. 118/2. Case filed by original landowner. Next hearing Jan 2026. Property cannot be safely registered until resolved.

plan.label: No Valid Building Sanction
plan.detail: BBMP records show the original 2018 plan sanction lapsed in 2022 and was not renewed. 1,847 homebuyers are living in units without a valid occupancy certificate.

developer.label: Developer: Under Government Investigation
developer.detail: Ozone Group is under Enforcement Directorate investigation for financial irregularities. K-RERA has issued 12 show-cause notices and one recovery certificate of ₹45.75 Lakh.

litigation_cases.detail: Disputed land ownership on Survey No. 118/2. Petitioner claims fraudulent sale deed.
K-RERA filed criminal complaint for selling unregistered units.
Investigation into FEMA violations and money laundering allegations.
